mapper.insert: INSERT INTO travel_mate_comment (comment_id, mate_id, member_id, content, parent_id) VALUES (SEQ_MATE_COMMENT_ID.NEXTVAL, #{mateId}, #{memberId}, #{content}, #{parentId, jdbcType=NUMERIC})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT a.*, ROWNUM rnum FROM ( SELECT c.comment_id as commentId, c.mate_id as mateId, c.member_id as memberId, c.content, c.parent_id as parentId, TO_CHAR(c.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') as createdAt, u.nickname, u.profile_image as profilePhoto FROM travel_mate_comment c JOIN member2 u ON c.member_id = u.member_id WHERE c.mate_id = #{mateId} AND c.parent_id IS NULL AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.created_at DESC ) a WHERE ROWNUM <= #{offset} + #{limit} ) WHERE rnum > #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM travel_mate_comment WHERE mate_id = #{mateId} AND parent_id IS NULL AND c.status = 1

SELECT c.comment_id as commentId, c.mate_id as mateId, c.member_id as memberId, c.content, c.parent_id as parentId, TO_CHAR(c.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') as createdAt, u.nickname, u.profile_image as profilePhoto FROM travel_mate_comment c JOIN member2 u ON c.member_id = u.member_id WHERE c.mate_id = #{mateId} AND c.status = 1 AND c.parent_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY c.created_at ASC
SELECT member_id FROM travel_mate_comment WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM travel_mate_comment WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} OR parent_id = #{commentId}
